engineering_claim: A bin-centered complex tone is placed in the expected shifted FFT bin
validation_method: Generate known complex tones at several bins and compare expected and detected bin frequencies

engineering_claim: The gain-corrected Hann window preserves bin-centered tone amplitude and reduces off-bin leakage
validation_method: Compare rectangular and Hann spectra for bin-centered and off-bin tones

engineering_claim: The percentile estimator follows flat curved and stepped baselines without being dominated by narrow peaks
validation_method: Generate known baselines with randomized noise and injected narrow peaks

engineering_claim: Detection probability increases with controlled SNR
validation_method: Run randomized tone-plus-noise trials across an SNR sweep

engineering_claim: Noise-only false detections are bounded under the configured adaptive threshold
validation_method: Run randomized noise-only frames under flat and uneven baselines

engineering_claim: The complete detector and temporal-confirmation chain produces a bounded confirmed false-signal rate under noise-only input
validation_method: Process consecutive flat-noise and uneven-baseline frames through the unchanged FFT detector and peak confirmer
report_artifact: Confirmation suppression report and time-series plots

engineering_claim: Two signals are resolved subject to the configured 75 kHz minimum spacing
validation_method: Sweep two-tone separation and relative amplitude

engineering_claim: The minus-15 dB bandwidth heuristic is repeatable but is not regulatory occupied bandwidth
validation_method: Generate controlled-width spectral shapes and compare reported widths

engineering_claim: Reported occupancy equals the fraction of bins above the local threshold for controlled spectra
validation_method: Construct spectra with known above-threshold bin fractions

engineering_claim: Stable carriers are measured with repeatable bounded frequency error after warm-up
validation_method: Measure known carriers after a 10 to 15 minute warm-up
report_artifact: Frequency accuracy table and error plot

engineering_claim: Frequency error approaches a stable range after receiver warm-up
validation_method: Observe one stable carrier from cold start for at least 20 minutes

engineering_claim: Measured relative level changes approximately with known attenuation under fixed gain
validation_method: Measure one stable source at known attenuation steps

engineering_claim: Relative amplitude is repeatable under unchanged conditions
validation_method: Repeat one stable source measurement without changing configuration
report_artifact: Amplitude repeatability table or box plot

engineering_claim: Noise floor and threshold vary predictably with RF environment and gain
validation_method: Compare quiet active antenna and terminated-input conditions where available

engineering_claim: Active and quiet spans produce statistically distinguishable spectral-bin occupancy
validation_method: Repeat measurements in selected active and quiet spans
report_artifact: Quiet versus active occupancy box plot

engineering_claim: Controlled source activation changes measured spectral-bin occupancy
validation_method: Repeat source OFF and ON conditions without changing receiver configuration

engineering_claim: Every recommendation is traceable to existing score components
validation_method: Save candidate-level results from repeated identical surveys

engineering_claim: Similar RF conditions generally produce similar rankings and explainable winner changes
validation_method: Repeat identical surveys over 88 to 92 MHz and 115 to 121 MHz
report_artifact: Winner histogram and score variation plot

engineering_claim: Measurements are collected only after confirmed tuning and settling
validation_method: Observe survey operation and preserve existing automated sequence-test result
